title: Yosys synth_ice40 -dsp fails on an assertion

features.name: multiplication_with_crosslinked_operands
features.description: Code should include a multiplication where one operand signal is derived from the other operand signal through shift/register operations, creating a cross-linked dependency that exceeds the DSP cell's single-user extraction constraint
features.snippet: reg1 <= {reg1[N-2:0], user_1}; reg2 <= {reg1[N-2:0], reg1[N-1]}; assign out = reg1 * reg2;

features.name: shift_register_via_concatenation_part_select
features.description: Code should include a shift register implemented using concatenation with part-select indexing {signal[N-2:0], signal[N-1]}, which when combined with multiplication creates DSP mapping issues on ice40

features.name: synth_ice40_dsp_size_sensitive_pattern
features.description: Code should include a multiplication pattern where register size N=40 triggers ice40 DSP mapping assertion failure while N=38 and N=42 work, indicating size-sensitive resource allocation
features.snippet: localparam N = 40; reg [N-1:0] reg1; reg [N-1:0] reg2; always @(posedge clk) reg1 <= {reg1[N-2:0], din};
